title: monelasmum reticulatum
intro: Monelasmum reticulatum, also known as the Retzius plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Monelasmum reticulatum can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional medicine.
